recycling.title: Don't Dump Old Batteries.

about.heroDesc: Ravulapalem's exclusive authorized branch of Terranova Smart Inverters — bringing premium LiFePO4 technology, expert installation, and 24/7 support to East Godavari.
about.storyP1: Smart Inverter's is the exclusive authorized distributor of Terranova Green Energy Private Limited in Ravulapalem, East Godavari. Terranova, headquartered in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, manufactures cutting-edge LiFePO4 lithium batteries and smart inverter systems — and we bring their full product range directly to your doorstep.
about.storyP2: As a Terranova authorized branch, every product we sell is 100% genuine, factory-backed, and covered by the full manufacturer warranty. Our certified technicians handle installation, servicing, and maintenance so you never have to worry about power outages again.
about.storyP3: Serving Ravulapalem and the surrounding East Godavari region, we have built trust with 5000+ families across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana by combining Terranova's world-class technology with our local expertise and round-the-clock support.
about.value1Desc: Every product is directly sourced from Terranova Green Energy — zero counterfeits, full manufacturer warranty.
about.value2Desc: 24/7 WhatsApp and phone support. We are always here when you need us.
about.value3Desc: Same-day service for most requests. On-time delivery with no excuses.
about.value4Desc: Certified Terranova technicians handle every installation to factory standards.
about.m1Desc: Terranova Green Energy Pvt Ltd incorporated in Nellore, AP — pioneering LiFePO4 technology in India
about.m2Desc: Smart Inverter's established as the exclusive authorized Terranova distributor in Ravulapalem, East Godavari
about.m3Desc: Terranova begins commercial operations — premium lithium inverter batteries now available to customers
about.m4Desc: Rapidly growing customer base across East Godavari district with 5-star service
about.m5Desc: Trusted by over 5000 families across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana
about.m6Desc: Launched full online platform for product orders, service bookings, and 24/7 support
about.ctaDesc: Join 5000+ families who trust Terranova Smart Inverters through our Ravulapalem branch for reliable, zero-maintenance power.
